name: Fish in Tomato-Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large skillet, sauté onion and garlic until tender.
2. Add basil and sauté for another few minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, tomato paste, water, white wine, oregano, and black pepper) to the skillet.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir so that the paste is fully incorporated.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
6. Add the flounder fillets and simmer for an additional 15 minutes or until the fish is completely cooked.
